strengths: 17+ years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the 15-year minimum requirement
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform in active use by Green Map) and built multiple open-source libraries, showing independent builder mentality
Recent direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) tooling at re:cinq, including code generators supporting agentic workflows
concerns: AI experience is shallow and very recent (April 2025 onward); no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at scale prior to current role, which is the role's central differentiator

No advanced degree — holds two bachelor's degrees (CS and Fine Arts); the preferred Master's/PhD in an AI-related field is absent, and no compensating publications, AI research, or recognized domain expertise

No evidence of customer or partner advisory work, enterprise strategic influence, or director-level scope; career is execution-focused with individual contributor breadth rather than strategic leadership depth
response.justification: The role requires a director-level IC who can shape AI strategy, advise enterprise customers, and demonstrate recognized AI expertise through built products or platforms. Bogdan's resume shows strong engineering breadth and longevity (17+ years) and nascent AI tooling work since April 2025, but the AI engagement is limited to MCP framework contributions with no evidence of designing or shipping AI-powered products at scale. There is no record of strategic customer advisory engagements, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no public recognition (publications, conference keynotes, or industry citations) in the AI space. The competencies most critical to this role — deep AI expertise, enterprise-level thought leadership, and strategic influence — are either absent or undemonstrated.
